variants: Ernest Gombos currently resides in Stormcrown Gate, a community that offers him the perfect backdrop for his professional endeavors. Originally from Harborreed Pointe, he pursued higher education at the Willowcrest Institute, honing his skills for a career in the security sector. Ernest found his calling at Lumina Vault Security, where he employs Malay spelling as his working or professional language. His steadfast dedication to his work has not only propelled his career forward but also made him an integral part of the team.
